import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None
def test_find_in_sorted_last_element():
    """Test finding the last element in array."""
    result = source.find_in_sorted([3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 7)
    # In fixed code, should return index 4
    assert result == 4

def test_find_in_sorted_value_greater_than_all():
    """Test searching for value greater than all elements."""
    result = source.find_in_sorted([3, 4, 5, 6, 7], 8)
    # In fixed code, should return -1 (not found)
    assert result == -1
